fighterBonusFeats.name: Blind-Fight
fighterBonusFeats.description: Reduces penalties for fighting while unable to see.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Combat Expertise
fighterBonusFeats.description: Trade attack bonus for AC bonus when fighting defensively.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Combat Reflexes
fighterBonusFeats.description: Make additional attacks of opportunity based on Dex modifier.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Deadly Aim
fighterBonusFeats.description: Trade attack bonus for damage bonus with ranged weapons.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Dodge
fighterBonusFeats.description: Gain +1 dodge bonus to AC against one designated opponent.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Improved Unarmed Strike
fighterBonusFeats.description: Deal lethal damage with unarmed strikes without penalty.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Point-Blank Shot
fighterBonusFeats.description: Gain +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls with ranged weapons at close range.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Power Attack
fighterBonusFeats.description: Trade attack bonus for damage bonus with melee weapons.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Quick Draw
fighterBonusFeats.description: Draw weapons as a free action.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Rapid Shot
fighterBonusFeats.description: Make one extra ranged attack per round at -2 penalty.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Shot on the Run
fighterBonusFeats.description: Move, shoot, and move again as a full-round action.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Toughness
fighterBonusFeats.description: Gain +3 hit points, +1 per HD beyond 3rd.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
fighterBonusFeats.description: Reduce penalties for fighting with two weapons.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Weapon Finesse
fighterBonusFeats.description: Use Dex modifier instead of Str for attack rolls with light weapons.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Weapon Focus
fighterBonusFeats.description: Gain +1 bonus on attack rolls with one weapon type.
